candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; suitable top-line and available in candidate list.
Direct sales/revenue line; same values as Total Revenue and may be the primary label in some years.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue labels. 'Net sales' is the more specific operating top-line; 'Total Revenue' is a fallback.

candidates.why: Direct production/input cost line and the best available match for cost of goods sold.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Overhead-style operating expense and valid SG&A component.
Overhead-style operating expense and valid SG&A component, though sometimes smaller/more residual.
Headcount metric, not an expense line; not suitable for SG&A.

variables.notes: Candidate list appears to miss a major SG&A component: 'Staff costs', which is a clear operating overhead line in the Income Statement. Included it along with candidate overhead rows 'Other external costs' and 'Other operating expenses'. Manual review flagged because selection uses a row outside the provided candidate list. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Staff costs

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Capitalized expenditure for research and development and similar
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Equity reserve, not income statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: No current-period R&D expense row is identifiable in the provided statements. Candidate rows refer to balance sheet items or amortization, not XRD expense.

candidates.why: Best direct match for interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Too narrow to use as the main interest expense line unless nothing else exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest detail, not the main interest expense line.

variables.notes: Used 'Interest Expense' as primary. Added 'Financial costs' from the full preview as fallback because 2025 shows blank for 'Interest Expense' while 'Financial costs' is populated, suggesting a possible label/reporting change. Manual review flagged because fallback is outside the candidate list and is broader than pure interest expense. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Financial costs

candidates.why: Equity component only, not full book equity.
Equity component only, not full book equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to parent company shareholders
candidates.why: Best match because it captures parent shareholders' equity and excludes non-controlling interests.
Acceptable fallback, but less preferred if parent-only equity exists.
Balancing row, not preferred when explicit equity exists.
Balancing row, not preferred when explicit equity exists.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Not an equity line.
Whole balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to parent company shareholders

variables.notes: Parent-only equity is preferred to avoid double counting minority interests. 'Total Equity' included only as fallback.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line is present in the provided Balance Sheet preview.
